title: 10 best herbal capsules for plantar fasciitis

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Frankincense capsules helps with plantar fasciitis because they contain boswellic acid, a natural anti-inflammatory compound that reduces swelling and pain in the affected area. The capsules also promote healing by improving blood flow to the plantar fascia, which helps to repair damaged tissues. Additionally, frankincense has been shown to reduce stiffness and improve mobility, allowing individuals with plantar fasciitis to engage in normal activities without discomfort or pain.
remedy_properties: Oleoresin Boswellia (Boswellia Serrata): Reduces inflammation and swelling in the affected area, helping to alleviate pain and discomfort associated with plantar fasciitis.
Acetyl-11-Keto-β-Boswellic Acid (AKBA): Has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to reduce pain, stiffness, and inflammation in the plantar fascia and surrounding tissues.
Furostanol Saponins: Exhibits analgesic and anti-inflammatory activities, helping to relieve pain and discomfort in the affected area by reducing swelling and inflammation.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes contain boswellic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce pain and swelling associated with plantar fasciitis.
Barks: The barks of the frankincense tree are rich in boswellin, a compound that has been shown to reduce inflammation and relieve pain in the heels and soles.
remedy_recipe: Grind 100g of dried boswellia serrata powder into fine particles using a mortar and pestle for 3 minutes.
Mix 500mg of ground boswellia serrata with 200mg of gelatin capsules in a small bowl until well combined.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the boswellia serrata mixture, ensuring each capsule contains exactly 700mg of herbal blend.
Place the filled capsules on a parchment-lined baking sheet and let them dry at room temperature for 24 hours.
Store the dried capsules in an airtight container away from direct sunlight and heat, using within 6 months of preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Bell pepper capsules helps with plantar fasciitis because they contain bioactive compounds that reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The antioxidants in bell peppers, such as vitamin C and beta-carotene, have potent anti-inflammatory properties that target the inflamed plantar fascia tissue. Additionally, the capsaicin present in bell peppers has analgesic effects, helping to numb the area and provide quick relief from discomfort and stiffness. By supplementing with herbal bell pepper capsules, individuals with plantar fasciitis can experience reduced symptoms and improved overall foot health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Certain herbs and spices, such as turmeric and ginger, have anti-inflammatory compounds that may help reduce pain and swelling associated with plantar fasciitis.

Antioxidant: Herbs like vitamin E-rich sweet basil or antioxidant-rich green tea may help protect the tissue surrounding the plantar fascia from oxidative damage, which can contribute to inflammation and pain.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the bell pepper plant contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing pain and inflammation associated with plantar fasciitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh capsicum annuum peppers in late summer or early fall when they are ripe and red.
Dry the peppers using a food dehydrator at 135°f for 6-8 hours or until they reach brittle texture.
Grind the dried peppers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 2000mg of the powdered pepper with 500mg of gelatin and 100mg of vitamin e oil, filling empty #00 capsules completely.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with plantar fasciitis because they contain curcumin, a potent anti-inflammatory compound that reduces swelling and pain in the affected area. The active ingredient in turmeric, curcumin, has natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties that help to alleviate discomfort and stiffness in the heel and bottom of the foot, providing relief from plantar fasciitis symptoms. Regular consumption of turmeric capsules can also promote healing and reduce inflammation in the tissues surrounding the plantar fascia, ultimately alleviating pain and discomfort associated with this condition.
remedy_properties: Curcuminoids: Curcuminoids, particularly curcumin, have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce pain and inflammation in the plantar fascia.
Cyclooxygenase inhibition: Turmeric's curcuminoids have been shown to inhibit the production of cyclooxygenase-2 (COX-2), an enzyme that contributes to inflammation and pain in plantar fasciitis.

Bioavailability enhancement: The bioavailability-enhancing properties of turmeric can increase the absorption of curcuminoids into the bloodstream, allowing them to reach their therapeutic targets more efficiently and effectively.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhyzome, also known as the rhizome, is the main part used in making turmeric supplements because it contains a high concentration of curcuminoids, which are responsible for its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties.
Roots: Turmeric roots contain bioactive compounds that have been shown to reduce pain and inflammation, making them an effective ingredient in medicinal capsules for plantar fasciitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry turmeric roots: collect fresh turmeric roots, wash them gently, and air-dry or dehydrate until brittle.
Grind dried turmeric into fine powder: use a spice grinder or mortar and pestle to grind the dried turmeric roots into a fine, consistent powder.
Mix with inert filler: combine 400mg of ground turmeric powder with 100mg of inert filler such as magnesium stearate and silica.
Fill capsules: add the turmeric-magnesium stearate mixture to empty gelatin capsules, filling each one by weight to ensure precise dosing.
Store finished capsules: place filled capsules in an airtight container, labeling with date, contents, and recommended dosage for future use within 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with plantar fasciitis because they contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory properties. This property helps to reduce swelling and pain in the affected area, providing relief from the discomfort associated with plantar fasciitis. Additionally, licorice root has been shown to improve flexibility and reduce stiffness in the feet and ankles, which can be beneficial for individuals experiencing chronic foot pain. By reducing inflammation and improving mobility, herbal licorice capsules can help alleviate symptoms of plantar fasciitis and promote healing.
remedy_properties: Glycyrrhizin: This compound has anti-inflammatory properties, which helps to reduce swelling and pain in the heel and ankle region associated with plantar fasciitis.
Flavonoids: These bioactive compounds have antioxidant properties, which help to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation that can contribute to plantar fasciitis symptoms.
Licoricidin: This compound has analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to reduce pain and discomfort in the heel and ankle region caused by plantar fasciitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in glycyrrhizin, an anti-inflammatory compound that helps reduce swelling and pain associated with plantar fasciitis.
Rhizomes: Contains a high concentration of isoflavones, which have been shown to improve joint flexibility and reduce inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry high-quality glycyrrhiza glabra roots to obtain 10 grams of dried material.
Grind the dried root into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 3 minutes.
Mix the powdered root with 100 grams of gelatin or plant-based capsule filler in a ratio of 1:10 by weight, taking 5 minutes to blend.
Add 20 milliliters of filtered water to the mixture, stirring until the powder is fully hydrated and forms a uniform paste, taking 2 minutes to prepare.
Fill empty capsules with the herbal licorice mixture using an encapsulation machine or spoon, aiming for a consistent fill weight of 500 milligrams per capsule, taking 10 minutes to complete.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with plantar fasciitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which help reduce swelling and pain in the affected area. The capsule's active compounds also promote blood circulation, reducing stiffness and discomfort in the heel and arch. Additionally, maidenhair tree has been traditionally used to ease joint pain and inflammation, making it a natural remedy for plantar fasciitis sufferers. Its topical application or oral consumption helps alleviate symptoms, allowing for a faster recovery and improved mobility.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Maidenhair tree capsules contain salicin, a natural anti-inflammatory compound similar to aspirin, which can help reduce pain and swelling in the heel and arch area associated with plantar fasciitis.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant compounds in maidenhair tree capsules can help protect against oxidative stress and tissue damage caused by inflammation, promoting healing and reducing chronic inflammation in the plantar fascia.

Pain-relieving properties: Maidenhair tree capsules contain alkaloids that have been shown to exhibit analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, helping to reduce pain and discomfort in the heel and arch area associated with plantar fasciitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Maidenhair tree roots have been traditionally used to relieve pain and inflammation, making them an ideal choice for treating plantar fasciitis.
Barks: The barks of the maidenhair tree contain compounds that help reduce swelling and alleviate discomfort in the heel and ankle region.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30g of fresh ginkgo biloba leaves and rinse them thoroughly under cold running water.
Dry the ginkgo biloba leaves in a warm place for 24 hours or use a food dehydrator at 55°c.
Grind 15g of dried ginkgo biloba leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 tablespoon of ground ginkgo biloba with 2 tablespoons of gelatin in a small bowl for 5 minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the ginkgo biloba mixture and store them in an airtight container.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe capsules helps with plantar fasciitis because they contain anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce swelling and pain in the affected area. The gel-like substance inside aloe vera has been shown to have potent analgesic properties, which can help alleviate the sharp, stabbing sensations often associated with plantar fasciitis. Additionally, aloe's natural anti-inflammatory agents can also aid in reducing scar tissue formation and promoting healthy tissue repair, making it an effective natural remedy for alleviating symptoms of plantar fasciitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Herbal aloe contains anti-inflammatory compounds such as aloin and aloe-emodin, which help to reduce inflammation in the plantar fascia, alleviating pain and stiffness associated with plantar fasciitis.

Moisturizing properties: Aloe's moisturizing properties help to hydrate the skin and soft tissues of the foot, reducing friction and pressure on the plantar fascia that can contribute to pain and inflammation.

Wound-healing properties: Herbal aloe capsules contain compounds such as vitamin E and beta-carotene, which promote collagen synthesis and tissue repair, helping to accelerate healing and reduce scarring associated with plantar fasciitis.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Rich in gel and latex, which provide anti-inflammatory and soothing properties to relieve pain and reduce swelling associated with plantar fasciitis.
Rhyzomes: Containing compounds like aloe-emodin, which help reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote healing of the affected area.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and clean aloe vera leaves by rinsing them with distilled water and patting dry with a paper towel.
Dry the aloe vera gel using an oven on low heat at 150°f for 2 hours or until crispy and brittle.
Crush dried aloe vera into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for 1 minute.
Mix 500mg of crushed aloe vera powder with 100mg of vitamin e oil and 20mg of glycerin in a small bowl.
Fill gelatin capsules with the aloe vera mixture and seal tightly, resulting in 60-80 capsules per batch.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tea capsules help with plantar fasciitis because they provide a concentrated dose of herbal extracts that target the underlying causes of pain and inflammation. The antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds in the tea, such as ginger and turmeric, work together to reduce swelling and ease pressure on the plantar fascia. By reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation, these capsules can help alleviate discomfort and stiffness, making it easier for individuals with plantar fasciitis to recover from daily activities and manage their condition over time.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Herbal teas like Turmeric, Ginger, and Boswellia contain anti-inflammatory compounds that can reduce swelling and pain in the plantar fascia, helping to alleviate symptoms of plantar fasciitis.

Pain-relieving properties: Herbal teas like Willow Bark, St. John's Wort, and Valerian Root have analgesic and anesthetic properties that can help numb the pain and discomfort associated with plantar fasciitis, allowing for easier movement and reduced discomfort.

Antioxidant activity: Herbal teas like Green Tea, Turmeric, and Ginger contain antioxidant compounds that can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which may contribute to the development of plantar fasciitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins and flavonoids, which help reduce inflammation and alleviate pain associated with plantar fasciitis.
Barks: Containing phenolic acids and terpenes, these compounds exhibit anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe and calm affected areas.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality camellia sinensis leaves in early morning or late afternoon for optimal flavonoid content.
Dry the harvested leaves using a food dehydrator at 150°f for 24 hours or air-dry them in a shaded area.
Grind the dried tea leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Fill vegetarian capsules with 250mg of the ground camellia sinensis powder and seal tightly to preserve freshness.
Store the herbal capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Kansas coneflower capsules helps with plantar fasciitis because they contain a powerful anti-inflammatory compound called parthenolide, which targets the root cause of pain and discomfort in the affected area. By reducing inflammation, these capsules alleviate pressure on the plantar fascia, allowing it to heal naturally and providing relief from pain and stiffness. Additionally, the capsules' antioxidant properties help to protect the affected tissue from further damage, promoting a faster recovery process.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Kansas coneflower contains bioactive compounds such as cichoric acid and echinacoside, which have been shown to reduce inflammation in the body, thus alleviating pain and discomfort associated with plantar fasciitis.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant properties of Kansas coneflower help protect tissues from oxidative damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to chronic inflammation and degeneration of tissues in the feet, including those affected by plantar fasciitis.

Immune-modulating compounds: The unique combination of polyphenolic acids and alkamides in Kansas coneflower capsules has been found to have immunomodulatory effects, helping to regulate the immune response and reduce inflammation in the body, which can contribute to the healing process of plantar fasciitis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins and phenolic acids, which help reduce inflammation and pain associated with plantar fasciitis.
Bark: Contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which helps alleviate pain and reduce swelling in the affected area.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried echinacea angustifolia roots in late summer or early fall for optimal potency and flavor.
Clean and grind 100g of the harvested root material into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 20g of the powdered root with 80g of organic rice flour and 10g of vegetable gum to improve flowability and shelf life.
Fill #0 capsules with approximately 200mg of the blended mixture and seal promptly to preserve potency.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to one year or refrigerate for extended storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemongrass capsules helps with plantar fasciitis because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which effectively reduce swelling and pain in the heel and arch areas. The capsules contain citral, a natural compound that increases blood flow and reduces inflammation, providing relief from chronic foot pain. Additionally, lemongrass has been shown to relax muscle tension, easing pressure on the plantar fascia and promoting healthy tissue repair. As a result, lemongrass capsules offer a natural and effective solution for alleviating the discomfort associated with plantar fasciitis.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Lemongrass contains anti-inflammatory compounds like citral and geraniol, which help reduce inflammation and pain in the affected area, alleviating discomfort caused by plantar fasciitis.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in lemongrass capsules, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, help neutralize free radicals that can damage tissues and contribute to chronic conditions like plantar fasciitis, promoting overall health and healing.

Pain-relieving properties: Lemongrass essential oil has been shown to exhibit analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help alleviate pain and discomfort associated with plantar fasciitis, allowing for a faster recovery.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes are the underground stems that store nutrients and energy, making them a rich source of bioactive compounds that can help reduce inflammation and alleviate pain associated with plantar fasciitis.
Roots: Lemongrass roots have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various inflammatory conditions, including arthritis, making them a suitable part for treating plantar fasciitis.
Barks: The barks of lemongrass plants contain flavonoids and terpenes that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation in the feet.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality lemongrass roots weighing approximately 500g.
Dry the lemongrass roots in a warm and well-ventilated area for 7 days.
Grind the dried lemongrass roots into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 2500mg of ground lemongrass powder with 500mg of gelatin and 20ml of purified water to create the capsule filling.
Fill empty vegetable capsules with the lemongrass mixture and store in an airtight container for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Angelica capsules helps with plantar fasciitis because they contain the herb angelica sinensis, which has natural anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce swelling and pain in the affected area. The capsules also promote blood circulation and relieve tension in the plantar fascia, a band of tissue that runs along the bottom of the foot. By reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation, herbal angelica capsules can provide effective relief from the discomfort and stiffness associated with plantar fasciitis, allowing for improved mobility and reduced pain.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Angelica extracts have anti-inflammatory compounds like ferulic acid, which can reduce swelling and pain associated with plantar fasciitis.
Analgesic: The essential oils in angelica capsules, such as eugenol and beta-pinene, have analgesic properties that can help relieve pain and discomfort in the heels and ankles.
Antioxidant: Angelica's antioxidant properties may help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation caused by free radicals, which can contribute to plantar fasciitis symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the Angelica plant contain a high concentration of angelic acid and other bioactive compounds that help reduce inflammation and alleviate pain associated with plantar fasciitis.
Rhizomes: The rhizomes of Angelica possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in reducing swelling and discomfort caused by plantar fasciitis.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh angelica archangelica leaves and stems at dawn when dew is still present for maximum potency.
Cleanse the harvested material by rinsing with cold filtered water then pat dry with a soft cloth.
Combine 20g of the clean dried angelica archangelica material with 10g of powdered ginger and 5g of powdered turmeric in a glass bowl.
Steep the mixture in 200ml of boiling water for 15 minutes to create a decoction then strain and discard solids.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 400mg of the cooled decoction liquid and seal immediately to preserve potency.

intro_desc: Herbal capsules for plantar fasciitis are a natural remedy designed to alleviate the pain, inflammation, and stiffness associated with this common condition. They typically contain a blend of herbal extracts such as turmeric, ginger, and devil's claw that work together to reduce swelling and relax the plantar fascia tissue. Examples of herbal capsules that help with plantar fasciitis include products from brands like NatureWise and Solaray. By taking these supplements regularly, individuals can experience improved mobility, reduced discomfort during daily activities, and enhanced overall quality of life, allowing them to resume their normal routines without the hindrance of plantar fasciitis pain.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat plantar fasciitis with herbal capsules is by choosing a formula that combines anti-inflammatory herbs like Turmeric and Ginger with analgesic herbs like Willow Bark and Capsaicin. These herbs work together to reduce pain and inflammation in the affected area, promoting healing and relief from discomfort. Consistently taking these herbal capsules as directed can help alleviate symptoms of plantar fasciitis and promote a speedy recovery.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to plantar fasciitis that are treated with herbal capsules are heel pain, Achilles tendonitis, and tennis elbow. Herbs such as turmeric, ginger, and ashwagandha have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and alleviate discomfort in these conditions. Other herbs like boswellia and willow bark may also provide relief by reducing inflammation and pain. These herbal capsules can be used in conjunction with other treatments to provide comprehensive care for these musculoskeletal issues.
